reason: Governs renderer-free adapter conformance fixtures and keeps wgpu/egui/Fret smoke tests outside core/runtime.
Records that persisted layout and policy fields stay in Graph for v1; node drag must not trigger schema movement.
Records the closed harness lane and follow-on decision to build drag/reconnect/resize/pan-zoom kernels separately.
Summarizes existing harness, selection, connect gesture, and follow-on boundaries.
Records the shipped renderer-neutral geometry surface that drag constraints can consume.
Defines draggable, extent, expand-parent, node origin, and view-state terminology.
Reference behavior for drag start/update/end ordering, threshold handling, snap, extents, and callbacks.
Reference behavior for drag item selection, selected-parent filtering, and shared snap offset.
Defines persisted node position, draggable, parent, extent, expand-parent, hidden, and size fields used by drag.
Defines SetNodePos transaction shape for drag commits.
Defines effective draggable and extent policy precedence for drag.
